heading: Get in touch
intro: I'm happy to be contacted by email, phone or text.
body: Reaching out can be the hardest part. Whether you already know you'd like to work together or you simply have a question, you're welcome to get in touch — there's no rush and no pressure.

steps.title: Reach out
steps.body: Send an email, call or text — whatever feels easiest. Tell me as much or as little as you like.

steps.title: A free 15-minute call
steps.body: We'll have a no-obligation video chat about what's going on and whether we're a good fit.

steps.title: Your first session
steps.body: If it feels right, we'll find a time that works and begin — at your pace.
